info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API documentation for the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, enabling efficient management of products, orders, and customers in an online store environment.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creating, updating, deleting, and retrieving product information.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for handling customer orders such as placing orders, updating order status, and retrieving order details.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer data including registration, authentication, profile updates, and customer queries.

post.description: Creates a new user in the system using the provided user details. Expects user information in the request body and returns the created user profile upon success.

example.message: Provided user data is invalid.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Allows a user to place a new order by specifying their user ID. Returns order confirmation and details upon successful placement.

example.message: The order data provided is invalid.
The specified user ID does not exist.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order by its unique order ID. Returns order data including items, status, and timestamps.

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.
No order found with the given orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart for a user identified by userId. The request body includes the item details. Returns the updated cart state upon success.

requestBody.description: Item details to add to the cart

example.message: The cart item details are invalid or incomplete.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the shopping cart contents for the user specified by userId. Returns the list of items currently in the cart along with totals.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current tracking information for the specified order identified by orderId. Provides shipment status, expected delivery date, and tracking events.

example.message: The order with the specified ID was not found.

details.issue: No order exists with the specified orderId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product listing by providing all required product details such as name, description, price, and stock quantity. Returns the created product details on success.

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality over-ear wireless headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: Provided product details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given name or SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment provider webhook notifications
post.description: Handles asynchronous payment status updates sent by payment providers. The webhook payload includes transaction status and metadata.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
The payment failed or was declined by the provider.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details including amount, payment method, and payer information. Returns payment confirmation and status.

example.message: Submitted payment details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Card number is missing or invalid

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment processor.

details.issue: Payment was declined by the provider

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction within the gateway.

totalAmount.description: Total cost of all items in the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the amounts, following ISO 4217 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

phone.description: User's phone number including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, regular).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user data was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price, in ISO 4217 format.

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discount

discount.description: Discount amount applied per product unit

finalPrice.description: Final price for the product after discount

quantity.description: Number of units added to the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before discount

discount.description: Discount amount per product unit in the cart

finalPrice.description: Final price for the cart item after discount

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total cost of all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Sum of discounts applied across all items

currency.description: Currency code used for all prices in the cart

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total monetary amount to be paid

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentMethod.description: Method used for the payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal

currency.description: Currency code in which the payment is made, ISO 4217 format

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing the transaction

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency code for transactions, ISO 4217 format

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

userType.description: Type or role of the user, e.g., admin, customer

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created

amount.description: The total amount processed in the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for this payment transaction

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment, e.g., completed, pending

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

rating.description: Average user rating of the product

available.description: Availability status of the product in stock

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to the product

error.description: Short error title describing what went wrong

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: List of specific validation or error details

field.description: Name of the field with an error

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: Short error title describing what went wrong

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the error
